title: McCarthy Tétrault Further Strengthens its Market-Leading Competition Law Team with Addition of Casey Halladay
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault Further Strengthens its Market-Leading Competition Law Team with Addition of Casey Halladay
Toronto, February 3, 2020 – McCarthy Tétrault is pleased to welcome Casey Halladay as an Equity Partner in the Firm’s Competition/Antitrust and Foreign Investment Group in Toronto.
Casey is an experienced competition lawyer, with particular expertise in cartel and civil investigations, competition litigation and merger review. He brings a unique analytical approach to these issues, having practiced with top-tier competition/antitrust firms in Washington, London and Toronto. The strategic addition of Casey solidifies the Firm’s strength in handling contentious competition matters, and complements its leading work in the areas of merger control, joint ventures and commercial practices. Known for his pragmatic and commercially-minded approach, Casey regularly advises clients on Competition Bureau investigations, including with respect to cartels, misleading representations, dominance and other reviewable conduct matters.
“Through his investigations and litigation practice, Casey complements the Firm’s already strong roster of competition lawyers”, said Jason Gudofsky, Chair of the Competition/Antitrust & Foreign Investment Group at McCarthy Tétrault. “He will provide tremendous value to our clients with his clear and thoughtful advice, breaking down legal complexities and being a passionate advocate on behalf of our clients.”
Donald Houston, senior competition litigator at McCarthy Tétrault added: “Casey has an enviable international and domestic reputation when it comes to investigations, cartel and merger work, and we are excited that he is bringing his skills and experience to McCarthy Tétrault.”
As competition investigations become more complex and document and data-focused, businesses are increasingly turning to external counsel for guidance. Clients trust McCarthy Tétrault’s Competition/Antitrust & Foreign Investment Group with their most strategic and critical competition, foreign investment and national security matters. The Group is positioned to navigate clients through the spectrum of competition matters, including mergers, joint ventures and strategic alliances, cartels, monopolistic practices, distribution and other vertical agreements and misleading advertising.
About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, advising on large and complex assignments for Canadian and international interests. The Firm has substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London, UK.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the Firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact:
- Casey Halladay Partner People.Offices.Singular Toronto
